message:
fix: use root:wheel for chown recommendation on macOS

The security warning in check_binary_ownership() previously hardcoded
root:root for the chown recommendation, which is incorrect on macOS
where the root group is 'wheel'. Now uses cfg!(target_os) to select
the correct group name per platform.

Fixes #4 (partial)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
